# ENS Subregistry Setup for `ledgit.eth`

## What was done

`ledgit.eth` was registered on ENSv2 (Sepolia) but could not create subnames (e.g.
`alice.ledgit.eth`) because it had no subregistry deployed. ENSv2 requires a
`PermissionedRegistry` (a lightweight proxy) to manage subname creation.

## Transactions sent

| Tx | Description | Status |
|----|-------------|--------|
| [`0x47a9e7...`](https://sepolia.etherscan.io/tx/0x47a9e7121b0a83092b0f18082982632fffd62c2950a92dcbecfc84e3b4a546b5) | Deploy `PermissionedRegistry` proxy for `ledgit.eth` via the `VerifiableFactory` | ✅ Confirmed |
| [`0x937e1a...`](https://sepolia.etherscan.io/tx/0x937e1a74d1d91a908c22f6c081a3186be6532394a692c8bf2ccaeaaa2dee3b46) | Set the deployed proxy as the subregistry for `ledgit.eth` in the ENSv2 registry | ✅ Confirmed |

**Subregistry proxy address:** `0xfF7f398d423b6b4354AD436a225840Daa4507ac4`

## Remaining transactions

These will create the subnames and set their HCS topic text records:

### Create `alice.ledgit.eth`

```
To: 0xfF7f398d423b6b4354AD436a225840Daa4507ac4
Data: 
```

### Create `bob.ledgit.eth`

```
To: 0xfF7f398d423b6b4354AD436a225840Daa4507ac4
Data: 
```

### Set text record: `alice.ledgit.eth` → topic `0.0.9219676`

```
To: 0x01926FaF6A2B6d618B600266209D6E031850e101
Data: 
```

### Set text record: `bob.ledgit.eth` → topic `0.0.9219677`

```
To: 0x01926FaF6A2B6d618B600266209D6E031850e101
Data: 
```

## Verification

After all transactions confirm:

```bash
ledgit verify alice.ledgit.eth   # resolves via ENS → shows 2 actions
ledgit verify bob.ledgit.eth     # resolves via ENS → shows 1 action
ledgit dashboard alice.ledgit.eth
```

No `LEDGIT_TOPIC_ID` env var needed — the ENS text record points to the topic.
